name: performance-k6
description: k6 performance tests for Momentus, generated via playwright-cli exploration

scripts.smoke:local: cross-env K6_WEB_DASHBOARD=true K6_WEB_DASHBOARD_EXPORT=temp/report.html k6 run source/tests/smoke.spec.ts
scripts.smoke:cloud: cross-env K6_WEB_DASHBOARD=true K6_WEB_DASHBOARD_EXPORT=temp/report.html k6 cloud run --local-execution source/tests/smoke.spec.ts
